title: review-findings
description: Schema for code review agent findings

file.description: Full file path relative to repository root

line.description: Line number where the issue occurs

category.description: Category of the issue (e.g., Security, Performance, DRY, KISS, Architecture)

issue.description: Brief one-line description of the issue

explanation.description: Detailed explanation of why this is a problem

recommendation.description: Specific, actionable recommendation to fix the issue

code_snippet.description: Actual code from the file showing the issue
